IArbitrable to receive rulings from Kleros Court  Flow: 1. ML/Oracle flags transaction as HIGH_RISK 2. Funds are escrowed in this contract 3. Challenge window opens (e.g., 24 hours) 4. Anyone can challenge \u2192 Creates Kleros dispute 5. Kleros jurors vote on evidence 6. Ruling executed: APPROVE (release funds) or REJECT (return to sender)","events":{"Dispute(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when a dispute is emergencyWithdraw(bytes32).details: Returns funds to original sender after 30 days past deadline

params._evidenceURI: IPFS URI with ML evidence (features, signals, etc.)

returns.isOperational: Whether the contract can accept new escrows

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._ruling: 1 = Approve (release to recipient), 2 = Reject (return to sender)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

canExecute(bytes32).notice: Check if transaction can be executed

challengeTransaction(bytes32).notice: Challenge an escrowed transaction - creates Kleros dispute

emergencyWithdraw(bytes32).notice: Emergency withdraw (owner only, for stuck funds)

escrowTransaction(bytes32,address,uint25.notice: Escrow a high-risk transaction for potential dispute

escrowTransactionERC20(bytes32,address,a.notice: Escrow an ERC20 token for potential dispute

executeTransaction(bytes32).notice: Execute the ruling or release after challenge window

getChallengeCost().notice: Get the cost to challenge a transaction

getTokenBalance(address).notice: Get token balance held in contract (for ERC20 escrows)

healthCheck().notice: Get contract health status for monitoring

requestAppeal(bytes32).notice: Request an appeal (off-chain coordination required to submit evidence to Kleros)

rule(uint256,uint256).notice: Called by Kleros when jurors reach a ruling

setEscrowPartialPct(bytes32,uint8).notice: Set partial percentage for an escrow (only owner/operator). Useful when arbitrator indicates partial split off-chain.

submitEvidence(bytes32,string).notice: Submit additional evidence for a dispute

updateMetaEvidence(string).notice: Update meta evidence for new dispute types
